resources.string:
Changes

Version 2.3.0 (2025-07-12)

  • Dark mode support
  • Switch to Material 3 UI components
  • Update dependencies and the Android SDK to v36

Version 2.2.1 (2023-12-10)

  • Updated dependencies and Android SDK version

Version 2.2.0 (2022-05-31)

  • Added all the newly translated English prayers from the past 2 years from bahai.org. All the new prayers and prayers that were previously under the Recently Added category have been moved to specific categories.
  • Added the Spanish version of the prayer for America
  • The app requires Android 6 (Marshmallow) or newer

Version 2.1.0 (2020-09-05)

  • Many more and updated Spanish translations from the Panel Internacional de Traducción de Literatura Bahá'í al Español
  • Minor correction to a Persian prayer

Version 2.0.0 (2018-02-01)

  • Reverted back to original English compilation
  • Corrections to several English prayers
  • Added a new category named Recently Added that contains newly translated English prayers
    • 12 prayers from Bahá'u'lláh
    • 19 prayers from 'Abdu'l-Bahá
  • Added a bottom bar allowing easier access to languages and other new features
  • Bookmarks!
  • Recently viewed prayers!
  • Updates and additions to localizations of the app's interface in many languages

News

For news and updates about Prayer Book, visit the website: https://www.prayerbook.app.

License

All Bahá'í sacred writings copyright Bahá'í International Community, source: reference.bahai.org

Created by Arash Payan. This app is licensed under the GPLv3 or later. The source code is available on GitHub.
